tagline: Measurement systems for real-world ocular oncology care.
heroSummary: We build outcome measures, evidence infrastructure, and clinical tools that make ocular oncology research usable in real care.
heroDetail: Our lab is virtual-first, project-driven, and builder-oriented. We combine clinical expertise, health services research, AI methods, and reproducible data infrastructure.
piSummary: Health services researcher focused on measurement frameworks, real-world evidence, and practical clinical systems.
joinSummary: We look for students and collaborators who are curious, reliable, and interested in turning research into usable clinical systems.
joinDetail: Trainees work on concrete projects: manuscripts, registry QA, outcome measurement, clinical AI validation, evidence synthesis, and implementation tools. The lab is virtual-first and project-driven, with a strong emphasis on clear writing, careful data work, and practical outputs that can be used by clinicians and research teams.
joinCtaText: Send a short note describing your interests, your CV, and any relevant research, writing, data, clinical, or software experience.

meta.title: O3R | Ocular Oncology Outcomes Research
meta.description: O3R builds measurement systems for ocular oncology: outcome measures, clinical data infrastructure, and decision-support tools for real-world care.
